judge_result.short_rationale: Removes contaminated clothing and gives a rinse step, but misses the required immediate action to call poison control or a doctor. It also adds wrong-incident eye-care advice and unsupported skin-treatment advice, which are dangerous unsupported claims under the benchmark rules. Escalation to hospital/clinic with SDS does not match the source-required call for treatment advice.
